category_sources: source_facts.description says Translate LaTeX to RTF; official GitHub README describes latex2rtf as translating LaTeX text into RTF.
display_name_sources: Official project documentation and GitHub repository use LaTeX2RTF/latex2rtf; source_facts.name is latex2rtf.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge-hosted project site has a dedicated Documentation page and user manual/usage page.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page says the project was transferred to GitHub at https://github.com/latex2rtf/latex2rtf; GitHub README describes the converter.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify LaTeX to RTF conversion for text processors.
